title: NBA Finals Putback Rim POV Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: NBA Finals Putback Rim POV Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable nba finals putback rim pov poster with controlled variables. Classification Label: NBA Finals editorial sports poster Intent: 基于 Game 4 真实补篮截图逻辑的 Knicks vs Spurs NBA Finals 热点图生图海报。 Trend Fact Guard: Knicks 107-106 Spurs, 29-point comeback, OG Anunoby putback with 1.2 seconds left, Knicks lead 3-1. Source Mode: img2img_reference_priority Subject Lock: OG Anunoby, New York Knicks, 8, San Antonio Spurs, second-jump putback tip-in, not a generic dunk or layup Theme: NBA Finals Game 4 last-second putback poster Subject: OG Anunoby in a white New York Knicks number 8 uniform finishing a last-second putback tip-in above the rim after a missed Jalen Brunson three-pointer Action Accuracy: Follow the real replay geometry from the source screenshot: loose ball near the cylinder, OG rising from under the rim, fingertip redirect, defenders clustered below and reacting late. Scene: Madison Square Garden, packed Finals crowd, Knicks orange and blue energy, Spurs defenders in black and silver Composition: overhead backboard fisheye POV, rim large in the foreground, ball and fingertips clearly visible over the cylinder, blue paint and hardwood below Graphic System: premium dark social poster, top-left 29-point comeback mini chart, top-right 3-1 series lead, bottom headline and handwritten New York line Typography: THE PUTBACK, 29 POINT COMEBACK, 3-1 SERIES LEAD, ONE WIN AWAY, 1.2 SECONDS LEFT, 107-106 Brand Elements: Knicks uniform cues, Spurs uniform cues, NBA Finals atmosphere, readable Knicks/Spurs labels where clean Negative Constraints: no generic dunk pose, no wrong jersey number, no distorted hands, no fake sponsors, no unreadable text blocks Variant focus: Nba Finals Og Putback Rim Pov Poster V1 Final. Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
